scheme_name: HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth

text_blocks.text: HDFC Small Cap Fund Direct Growth key fund facts. NAV: 158.999. NAV date: 06-Jul-2026. Expense ratio: 0.77%. Minimum SIP investment: ₹100. Minimum lumpsum investment: ₹100. Fund size (AUM): ₹38,809.48 Cr. Riskometer: Moderately High Riskometer. Category: Equity — Small Cap. Plan: Direct Growth.
Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
Fund benchmark: BSE 250 SmallCap Total Return Index.
The scheme seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation /income by investing predominantly in Small-Cap companies.

Stamp duty on investment: 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020). If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.
